title: Alliums are Clearly Purple
description: Changes alliums to produce purple dye instead of magenta.
body:
# Alliums are Clearly Purple
Most dyes in Minecraft can be obtained through parts of the environment, but purple dye is only obtainable by combining red dye and blue dye. This datapack changes alliums to craft purple dye instead of magenta.
## Showcase:
